---
title: "Dead Dogs Analytics Visualizations"
author: "Alessandro Speranza"
date: "6/27/2021"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, cash = TRUE)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(plotly)
```

## Get Data
```{r}
file_url <- "https://github.com/asperanz/Dead-Dogs-Analytics-ShinyDashboard/blob/main/data/top10_rank.rda"

url <- "https://github.com/asperanz/Dead-Dogs-Analytics-ShinyDashboard/blob/main/data/top10_rank.rda?raw=true"
download.file(url, destfile= "/data/top10_rank2.rda", mode = "wb")
load("/data/top10_rank2.rda")

load(url(file_url))

```
